operations.command:
git add .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-01-PLAN.md .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-02-PLAN.md .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-03-PLAN.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs(03): create phase plan

Phase 03: Overnight Rates & FX
- 3 plan(s) in 1 wave(s)
- 3 parallel, 0 sequential
- Ready for execution

Plans:
- 03-01: SOFR collector (NY Fed + FRED fallback)
- 03-02: €STR, SONIA, CORRA collectors
- 03-03: FX collectors (DXY, major pairs via yfinance)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

operations.command:
git add .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-01-PLAN.md .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-02-PLAN.md .planning/phases/03-overnight-rates-fx/03-03-PLAN.md .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs(03): fix phase plans after cross-check

Changes:
- 03-02: Add Task 4 for rate differential calculation (carry trade signals)
- 03-03: Remove COFER from objective (deferred to Phase 5)
- ROADMAP: Move FX-05 (COFER) from Phase 3 to Phase 5
- ROADMAP: Add 05-05 plan for COFER collector
- REQUIREMENTS: Update FX-05 mapping to Phase 5

COFER (quarterly data with 3-month lag) fits better with Capital Flows phase.
Rate differentials enable immediate carry trade signal generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

operations.description: Check GitHub Project status before push
Push changes to trigger potential auto-sync
Check if sync workflow was triggered
